---
title: "CV"
---

<link rel="stylesheet" href="styles.css" type="text/css">

![Alternate Name](files/Blumstein_Meghan_CV.pdf){width=500px}

<embed src="files/Blumstein_Meghan_CV.pdf" type="application/pdf"   height="700px" width="500">

<img style="float: right; width:50%; border:0px solid; margin-left: 10px" src="images/core_hf_1.jpg">

<br>

My full CV is available for download [here](files/Blumstein_Meghan_CV.pdf).
